concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' lacks concrete deliverable. Does not name specific directories/files to create. Implementer cannot execute deterministically.
T054 'Documentation updates in specs/...' is vague. Does not specify which files to update, what content to add, or verification criteria. Cannot execute without additional specification.
T055 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all modules' is non-executable. Does not specify which modules, what cleanup criteria, or how to verify completion.
T056 'Additional unit tests in tests/unit/ for edge cases' lacks concrete deliverable. Does not name specific test files or test cases to add.

Phase 7 tasks marked [ ] while all others [X] creates ambiguity about completion requirements. Spec.md marks hydration/conformational ensembles as 'out-of-scope' but T063-T068 implement them. Clarify if these are required or optional future work.

Constraint enforcement tasks (T049 time limit, T050 CPU cores, T052 memory) are in Phase 6 (Validation) which executes AFTER user stories. Cannot enforce constraints during actual training runs. Should be in Phase 2 (Foundational) or integrated into each user story task.
T034 'Generate results/metrics.csv' does not specify required columns. Downstream tasks (T041, T044, T046) depend on {'rmse', 'model', 'mae'} columns. Add column specification to task description.
T043 'Generate results/significance.csv' does not specify required columns or format. Downstream analysis depends on this file structure. Add column specification.

T019 'Add validation for missing 3D coordinates handling' mentions 'exclusion report' in acceptance criteria but does not specify report format, location, or content. Add concrete deliverable specification.
T040 'Rank structural contributions' does not include verification that ≥3 features are identified as required by SC-002. Add explicit validation step to task description.

T045 and T046 both generate visualizations but unclear division of responsibility for which figures trace to which data rows. May violate Constitution Principle IV (Single Source of Truth). Clarify traceability requirements.

T032 references arXiv paper (2305.18454) but FR-011 requires validation against QM9 quantum calculation reference data (B3LYP/6-31G(2df,p)). Task description should reference QM9 dataset specification, not external paper.
